sections.paragraph:
ἐμπαίκτης, ου, ὁ (Is 3:4) (s. preceding cognate entries) mocker Jd 18; 2 Pt 3:3.—TW.

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6
